name: Company Casserole
directions: Brown ground beef and onion in skillet.
Add salt, to taste, pepper and tomato sauce; simmer slowly while preparing remaining ingredients.
Combine cottage cheese, cream cheese, sour cream, green pepper and green onion.
Place half of cooked noodles in a greased 3 qt.
baking dish.
Top with cheese mixture over top, and then remaining noodles.
Pour meat mixture over top.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.

name: Shrimp and Wild Rice Casserole
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Pour into a greased 2 1/2 quart casserole dish.
Bake at 375 degrees for 30-35 minutes.

name: Shrimp and King Crabmeat Casserole
directions: Combine all ingredients and put in buttered casserole.
Sprinkle cracker crumbs on top.
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.

name: Baked Seafood "salad"
directions: Mix together peppers, onions, and celery and seafood.
Add mayo, salt and pepper to taste, and Worcestershire sauce.
Pour into greased casserole or 8 individual shells (greased).
Mix together the melted butter and the bread crumbs and sprinkle over the top.
Bake in a preheated 350 F oven until the top is browned, about 30 minutes.

name: Cheesy Beef  'n Biscuit Casserole
directions: Brown ground beef, onion and green pepper; drain.
Stir tomato sauce, chili powder and garlic salt.
Simmer while preparing dough.
Separate biscuit dough into 10 biscuits.
Pull each apart into 2 layers.
Press 10 biscuit layers over bottom of ungreased 9 inch baking pan.
Combine 1/2 cup cheese (reserve remaining cheese for topping), sour cream and egg; mix well.
Remove meat mixture from heat; stir in sour cream mixture.
Spoon over biscuits.
Arrange remaining biscuit layers on top.
Sprinkle with remaining cheese.
Bake at 375 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until biscuits are a deep golden brown.

name: Cheesy Casserole
directions: In a skillet brown beef, drain.
Add soup, salt and pepper; simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove from heat.
In a large mixing bowl, combine cottage cheese, sour cream, green onions and noodles.
Layer noodle mixture alternately with meat sauce in a greased 2-qt casserole.
Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes.
Sprinkle with cheese; return to oven for 5-10 minutes or until cheese melts.

name: Southern Shrimp Casserole
directions: Saute celery, bell pepper and onion in butter.
Slowly add remaining ingredients and stir well.
Pour mixture into a 9 X 13 inch casserole dish and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes.
I top ours with another little sprinkle of cheese before serving.

name: King Ranch Chicken Casserole
directions: In a large pan, sauté onion, bell pepper, and mushrooms in butter, Add soups, tomatoes & chilies, garlic, chili powder, and chicken broth. Line bottom of a 9x13 inch pan with pieces of tortillas. Spread half the chicken over the tortillas and top with half of the sauce, then half of the cheese. Cover with another layer of torn corn tortillas, and repeat the chicken, sauce and cheese layers. Bake at 350 degrees F for 30 minutes or until bubbly.
Serves 6.
(When freezing, put in freezer after assembling casserole, and bake when ready to eat.).
